Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Trust and teamwork are at an all-time low as Sonic goes against Chaos Sonic leaving Rebel Rogue and Renegade Knuckles to battle the supercharged Chaos Council forces alone.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Sonic tells Nine about Ghost Hill, its shard, and its blueprint to reassemble the Paradox Prism to restart the real world. But all Nine hears is that there's a fourth shard.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: SpongeBob forgets who he is when his name tag goes missing in 'Missing Identity', and in 'Plankton's Army', Plankton celebrates 25 years of trying to steal the Krabby Patty recipe.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Sponge Who Could Fly (AKA The Lost Episode): Patchy discovers a brand new episode of SpongeBob - and then loses it. But he finds it again! Meanwhile, SpongeBob tries to fly.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: An old bear claiming to be Boog's dad divides the camp in 'Father Fibber', then in 'Freaky Fried Eggs', Elliot overeats and has a nightmare.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Mole rats are planning to have a party in 'Camp Times Two', then in 'Straight from the Horse's Mouth', The campers help a horse get his groove back.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Theodore's new toy is annoying Alvin and Simon in 'Talking Teddy', then in 'Principal Interest', Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school, until he sees the new Principal.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers in 'Sister Act', then in 'Lil' T', Theodore posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: SpongeBob throws away Mr Krabs' old mattress - the one that he kept all his money in - in 'The Lost Mattress', and then in 'Krabs vs. Plankton', Plankton slips and sues The Krusty Krab for damages.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: When SpongeBob forgets to feed Gary, he runs away to downtown Bikini Bottom and the very comfortable house of a kindly old woman.
